case_title: HEWIEH HEWIEH VS. WELLS FARGO & COMPANY

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $125.00) SERVED SEP-15-2021, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT WELLS FARGO & COMPANY
(SC-105)REQUEST FOR COURT ORDER AND ANSWER FILED BY DEFENDANT WELLS FARGO & COMPANY AS TO PLAINTIFF HEWIEH, HEWIEH

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF HEWIEH HEWIETH IS NOT PRESENT. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT WELLS FARGO & COMPANY VIA ZOOM REPRESENTED BY NICOLE BENDER, ACCOUNT RESOLUTION TEAN LEAD. JUDGE MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
